Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":1,"maxLength":100},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was delivered. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Tracking number for the item. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV3OrderItemExtended"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"sentDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of order shipping"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Order state","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["currency","value"],"properties":{"currency":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"number"}},"title":"Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV3OrderExtended"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
